} @if (!loading && reservations.length === 0) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.NO_RESERVATIONS_FOUND' | translate }}
} @if (!loading && reservations.length > 0) { @for (item of reservations | slice:startIndex - 1:endIndex; track item.id) { }

{{ startIndex + '-' + endIndex }} {{ 'INVENTORY.OF' | translate }} {{ reservations.length }}
} @if (reservationToDelete) {
{{ 'RESERVATION.DELETE_TITLE' | translate }}

}
}
